verse_text: and do not think to say to yourselves, 'We have Abraham as our father.' For I say to you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones.

pericope.title: John the Baptist's Call to Repentance

links.context: These verses are reminiscent of John the Baptist's and Jesus' images and parables of trees and their fruit ([[MAT.3:8]]-10; 7:16-20; 12:33; 21:19).
